stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What do the symbols 1, 7 and 8 stand for?

options.a:
1. VOR check-point.
7. Tree/shrub.
8. Aerodrome Reference Point (ARP).
options.b:
1. Compulsory RP
7. Aerodrome Reference Point (ARP).
8. Tree/shrub.
options.c:
1. Fly-over on request RP. 
7. At or above altitude/FL. 
8. Mandatory altitude/FL.
